narrations.assessor: Adam reviews Home — burst pipe damage for Michael
narrations.comms: Cara confirms to Michael that the claim is APPROVED and walks him through the repair plan — claim closed

extras.narration: Lara reviews inspection photos and estimates the repair scope.
Sam books an approved plumber and drying gear.

beats.narration: Michael discovers a burst pipe has flooded the kitchen and calls Zava Insurance.
Michael leaves the residential street and heads through the neighbourhood toward the Zava Insurance Claims Office.
Michael steps inside the Zava Claims building and joins the reception queue.
Michael lodges his Home — burst pipe damage claim at the Zava Insurance reception.
Iris picks up the claim and confirms next steps.
Iris routes the claim to the Claims Assessor.
Adam checks coverage for water damage — covered.
Lara reviews the inspection photos and estimates the repair scope.
Sam books an approved plumber and emergency drying gear.
Adam hands the claim to Settlement.
Seth approves the payout less the excess.
Cara calls Michael with the final decision — claim APPROVED — and confirms the payout amount and repair timing.
